Aren Vista

Education

Bachelor of Science: Mathematics, Computer Science, Biochemistry
University of Maryland, Baltimore County
2027

Experience

Undergraduate Researcher: Mathematics | Bedrich Sousedik: UMBC Dec 2025 - Present
  • Engineer optimized betting strategies by implementing Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) simulations to model complex probability distributions.
  • Develop predictive probabilistic models to quantify financial risk, forecast expected returns, and validate long-term strategy viability.
  • Analyze large-scale simulation outputs to extract statistically robust patterns, guiding highly efficient decision-making frameworks.
Undergraduate Researcher: Computer Engineering | Riadul Islam: UMBC Dec 2025 - Present
  • Architect and train Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) to classify complex temporal datasets with high precision.
  • Design and deploy Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) to automate sophisticated image classification pipelines.
  • Benchmark network architectures and optimize hyperparameters to maximize inference accuracy and computational efficiency.
Project Lead: Computational Biologist | National Institutes of Health Jun 2021 - Jun 2023
  • Spearheaded anomaly detection and disease pathology classification by clustering highly dimensional (10K-variate) datasets.
  • Engineered automated High-Performance Computing (HPC) workflows to rapidly accelerate 3D protein structure prediction and modeling.
  • Developed a custom sequence alignment algorithm to accurately categorize over 1,000 distinct 20KB DNA segments.
Undergraduate Researcher: Organic Chemistry | Seley Radtke Lab: UMBC Jun 2017 - Jun 2020
  • Designed and optimized a novel synthetic pathway for N-glycosylated imidazole 4-boronic acids, successfully increasing overall yields by 40%.
  • Synthesized highly targeted fleximer nucleoside analogues designed to inhibit viral replication complexes in SARS-CoV and Ebola.
  • Built an automated web-scraping pipeline using Python, BeautifulSoup4, and Selenium to curate a comprehensive database of approved nucleoside analogues.
Undergraduate Researcher: Molecular Biology | Vasta Lab: IMET Jun 2017 - Jun 2020
  • Innovated a lactose-conjugated Sepharose synthesis scheme, dramatically driving down experimental reagent costs by 80% (fivefold reduction).
  • Streamlined protein purification and modification workflows, generating primary data that contributed directly to a research publication.
  • Formulated rigorous calibration curves for critical laboratory equipment, enhancing overall instrument measurement accuracy by 76%.
